creator: lantw44@gmail.com
text:
The commit which changed WITH_PROTOBUF=system to WITH_PROTOBUF=bundled said it is needed to fix i386 build: https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=6498bc6381cc493b38ff7d1ab6087a66f0ec238f

However, removing libprotobuf.so:devel/protobuf from LIB_DEPENDS doesn't fix the issue.
